data.title: Elizabeth Moellering Named General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Maximus
data.description: Elizabeth Moellering has been appointed as the new General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Maximus, a company based in Tysons, Virginia. This appointment comes as a strategic move for the company to strengthen its legal team. Maximus is a prominent organization known for its work in the industry.

data.title: Trump criticizes prediction markets, calling the world a 'casino' as soldier faces charges over $X bets on Polymarket on Maduro's fate.
data.description: The President of the United States expressed his lack of enthusiasm for prediction markets, stating that he had never been a strong supporter of them. This statement comes in light of a recent insider trading case, which underscored the potential risks associated with such markets.

data.title: New Data Demonstrate Safety and Effectiveness of Bridge to Life's VitaSmart Hypothermic Oxygenated Machine Perfusion (HOPE) System in Partial Graft Pediatric Liver Transplantation
data.description: Research findings were discussed during an oral presentation at the 30th Annual Meeting of the Society of Pediatric Liver Transplantation (SPLIT), a division of The Transplantation Society (TTS). The study revealed promising results on the use of HOPE in pediatric liver transplantation. Further abstracts presented at the event also provided additional evidence supporting the benefits of using HOPE in these procedures. This information was shared in Duluth, Georgia, on April 24, 2026.

data.title: Lanvin Group to Report 2025 Full-Year Audited Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Luxury fashion group Lanvin Group (NYSE: LANV) will unveil its audited full-year 2025 results on April 30, 2026. This event will take place at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time and 8:00 p.m. China Standard Time.

data.title: Autonomous Resource Corporation and Oak Ridge National Laboratory Partner to Accelerate AI-Enabled Defense Manufacturing at National Scale
data.description: Strategic collaboration merges the supercomputing and advanced manufacturing capabilities of ORNL with ARC's autonomous production platform to tackle crucial shortages in the defense industrial base. The partnership between ORNL based in Oak Ridge, Tennessee, and ARC in New York was officially announced on April 24, 2026. This alliance aims to leverage ORNL's expertise in supercomputing and manufacturing alongside ARC's autonomous production technology to address critical shortcomings in the defense industry.

data.title: Infinix Launches GT 50 Pro: The Ultimate Hardcore Gaming Flagship with Industry-First Cooling and Control
data.description: Infinix has introduced the GT 50 Pro, an innovative mobile device enhanced by a cutting-edge thermal engine. This technology seamlessly combines physical accuracy with top-tier hardware and intelligent software to elevate the gaming experience for users. The launch took place in Hong Kong on April 24, 2026. The Infinix GT 50 Pro promises to deliver exceptional performance for next-generation gaming, setting new benchmarks in the industry.

data.title: Jtibot Showcases Autonomous Outdoor Sweeping Innovation at Interclean Amsterdam 2026, Accelerating European Market Expansion
data.description: Jtibot, a company specializing in autonomous outdoor cleaning technology, recently completed a successful exhibition at Interclean Amsterdam 2026. The showcase emphasized the company's specialization in AI-powered sweeping for various sectors including industrial, municipal, and campus settings. The event took place at Hall 8 and displayed the company's commitment to large-scale cleaning solutions.

data.title: 2U Refinances and Raises Growth Capital
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, on April 24, 2026, numerous education technology firms reduced their operations in 2024 and 2025. During this time, there was a decline in new university collaborations as educational institutions focused on enhancing their in-house capabilities. However, amidst these market trends, 2U successfully underwent a growth recapitalization. The company's current owners decided to inject more capital into the business, highlighting their confidence in its potential during a challenging period for the industry.

data.title: Johnson Outdoors to Release Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results on May 8, 2026
data.description: RACINE, Wisconsin - Johnson Outdoors Inc. (Nasdaq: JOUT), a prominent innovator in outdoor recreation gear and technology, is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of Fiscal 2026 on May 8, 2026, before the market opens. Following the announcement, a conference call and audio webcast will be held at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review the financial outcomes and offer a Company update.

data.title: Nano Labs (NA) and ALT5 Sigma Corporation (ALTS) Announce Memorandum of Understanding to Jointly Explore Establishing North America AI data centers, Agent Cloud and AI Infrastructure
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 24, 2026, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA) disclosed an agreement with ALT5 Sigma Corporation (Nasdaq: ALTS) to explore collaboration in AI data centers, Agent Cloud, and AI-native payments. The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) is structured and non-binding, aimed at assessing joint efforts between the two companies. Nano Labs, a prominent Web 3.0 infrastructure and product solutions provider alongside a crypto treasury firm, partnered with ALT5 for this initiative. The collaboration will be bolstered by defined workstreams and shared leadership between the entities.
